'''Renn Tharen''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] who was the father of [[Bria Tharen]] and was a wealthy businessman on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. Renn was married to [[Sera Tharen]] and had a son named [[Pavik Tharen]]. When Bria returned from [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] with [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], Renn was the only member of her family who liked Solo. Renn saw in him a kindred spirit, for Renn himself had lived a hard life before becoming successful. When Bria left Han on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], she obtained a loan from her father that she gave to Han, which he eventually was able to repay. After being accepted into the Academy on [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], Han once tried to find Bria through him. When Bria was killed on [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]] while retrieving the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] [[Death Star plans/Legends|plans]], Han notified him of her death.
